notes: Pure-Python atheris harness. The Mayhem target is a thin ELF launcher (mayhem/fuzz_launch.c) that execs python3 on mayhem/fuzz_resource_creation.py, because Mayhem requires an ELF target. The functional oracle (mayhem/fhir_selftest) is likewise an ELF launcher so the anti-reward-hack sabotage check can neuter it.
